history.content:
<thought>
The goal is located at row 05 column E. Currently, the cell directly in front of me (row 07, column 7) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I need to move right. Turning right will allow me to move into the free cell at my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located at row 05 column B. The cell directly in front of me (row 07 column 7) contains lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to move to the left to avoid the lava and proceed towards the goal. Turning left will allow me to move into the free cell at my left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column E, three cells ahead and three cells to the right of my location. The cell in front of me is a deadly lava cell, so I cannot move forward. I will turn clockwise to head to the free neighbor cell at my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
